title: cotoneaster rotundifolius var. lanatus
intro: Cotoneaster rotundifolius var. lanatus, commonly known as the woolly cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Japan. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cotoneaster rotundifolius var. lanatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
